Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you have never been to Alaska before, these next three episodes are an absolute must-see. The crew heads to Glacier Bay National Park, Alaska, to meet up with Alaskan Anglers Inn for an epic week of fishing. This fishing destination is unique in more ways than one. Not only does Shea McIntee and the rest of the crew get a chance to fish for the famous and bucket list fish, wild Alaskan Halibut, due to the glorious summer weather, they also get to see stunning wildlife in and out of the water.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Aligator Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Sierra Nevada mountain range in California is home to many lakes with excellent trout fishing. Thanks to Shea's father, Patt McIntee, June Lake has been a favorite for decades. We spend some time fishing both June Lake and Lake Crowley. Then later, we fish a lake that is brand new to us.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - We Love Fishing the High Sierras, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the most incredible parts of fishing includes traveling to new destinations, making new friends, and catching new fish. Shea McIntee and the crew travel north to Santa Barbra and jump on board the 58-foot charter boat, the Coral Sea. We get extra lucky because mother nature allows us to travel up the coastline into a territory that most people don't get the opportunity to fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Full Speed Rock Fishing on the Coral Sea
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Florida's weedy Lake Okeechobee boasts topwater buzzbait bassin' at its best.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lunker redfish put tackle to the test on jetties of the Mississippi River Delta in Louisiana.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Smallmouth bass, particularly those that are positioned shallow, are susceptible to a topwater lure. Yet, anglers need to realize as conditions change, so should your lure choice.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing for Health, how fishing helps Law Enforcement personnel cope with the stressors of the job.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The story of a Wisconsin soldier who reveals his real-life struggles as a 37-month prisoner of war during the Korean War.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Korean War POW Darrell Krenz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week on Larry smith outdoors we work with the DNR to get a read on how many flathead are in the system. Some of these monsters already have tags and have been swimming for a couple years now. Come with us as we learn the process about how the DNR tracks the movement patterns and spawning locations for these flathead
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Netting Flathead with the DNR
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Alabama Thaw
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeremy Smith target big summer bass in the slop, sharing their winning program for flipping jigs, Texas rigs, and frogs for more and bigger bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Larry takes us old-school bobber fishing for hungry bluegills.
Video.title: Bluegills Winnebago

Video.summary: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Building a Bladed Jig Rod
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin uses cool new bait to help catch finicky bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | New Spin on Finesse
Video.title: Episode 1
